title: Advanced Scheduling (Affinity, Taints, & Tolerations)
description: Implement advanced scheduling strategies using Node Affinity, Pod Affinity/Anti-Affinity, Taints, and Tolerations. Control workload placement based on hardware specifications, data locality, or fault domain isolation.
objectives: Implement advanced scheduling strategies using Node Affinity, Pod Affinity/Anti-Affinity, Taints, and Tolerations.
Control workload placement based on hardware specifications, data locality, or fault domain isolation.
